sequences.name: Skip link to main content
sequences.expectedOutcome: Focus moves from skip link to main content container.

sequences.name: Navigate through primary actions
sequences.expectedOutcome: Focus moves in a predictable order across actionable controls.

sequences.name: Open and close modal using Escape
sequences.expectedOutcome: Dialog opens, then closes and restores focus to trigger.

sequences.name: Arrow navigation in composite control
sequences.expectedOutcome: Selection moves within the composite control and activates the intended item.
